title: ebenidium depressum
side_effects: Ebenidium depressum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. In rare cases, improper use of ebenidium depressum may cause cardiovascular issues, such as increased heart rate, palpitations, and even cardiac arrhythmias. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using ebenidium depressum for any health benefits.
